To avoid discussion whether Tech4Palestine's compilation can be used as a source, I used other sources. I still kept the part of the note saying that recovered bodies/people declared dead are not counted as "new" deaths.

The note strays into SYNTH and Tech4Palestine is still not a RS. There are dozens upon dozens of RS providing the numbers that the GHM is putting out so one of those many should be used if it's needed (which it is not here, as we should just be citing the number calculated from Spagat et al.)

Adding estimate (Spagat et al.). But also adding the recorded figure for 19 Jan 2025 - 16 Feb 2026 because Spagat et al. does not cover that period. A good source for the recorded figure for 19 Jan 2025 - 16 Feb 2026 that distinguishes between new deaths and retroactively added old deaths is this CSV file from Tech for Palestine.

per [[WP:NPOV]], "Avoid presenting seriously contested assertations as facts", the claim that israel is committing genocide in gaza should not be presented as fact given that it is highly contested; it is not wikipedia's responsibility to push a particular point of view but rather to allow readers to make their own decisions about ongoing debates, given that many wikipedia-reliable sources do not assert that israel is committing genocide in gaza
